description: Claude markdown bullet response with single-word + U+2026 ellipsis. Captured by test-conpty/test-attention-false-match.mjs (2026-04-26): without the ^ anchor in SPINNER_RE, this matched the classifier and would have left the ThinkingIndicator showing if isThinking was stuck true. The 2-space indent is what xterm renders for a markdown bullet inside Claude's response.
